## Profile

B2BE is a document and procurement automation platform (B2BE Solutions). SRX uses a B2B system (likely for EDI or electronic document exchange — exact usage TBC) that has user-facing controls, unlike StreamServe which is back-end only.

## SRX Usage

- **Role**: B2B document exchange / EDI (exact function TBC — transcript was inconclusive)
- **Status**: Current system functional but an upgrade or replacement is under consideration
- **Users**: Has user controls — end users interact with it (unlike StreamServe)

| Date | Signal | Source | Assessed Impact |

| 2026-02-12 | Manal Attalla raised B2BE as an option for an updated B2B solution: "we can go to B2BE themselves and find an updated solution." Karen acknowledged this would "cost a lot more money." Discussion was brief and inconclusive. | IT strategy meeting (Karen Lewin, Manal Attalla) | Medium — cost concern flagged; no decision made |

## Open Questions

- What does the current B2B system at SRX do specifically? (EDI, e-procurement, supplier portal?)
- What is the current B2B system/version and why does it need replacing?
- Has B2BE been formally evaluated or is this early-stage consideration?
- What is the cost delta between the current solution and B2BE's updated offering?
